---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new in the SDK or in an example
title: "[fr] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

**The problem**
What clinical / developer scenario isn't covered today?

**The user**
Who hits this — a hospital developer integrating their EMR? A doctor
using a third-party app? Someone running OHM self-hosted?

**Proposed shape (optional)**
If you have a sketch of the API, share it. Or just describe the
desired behaviour and we'll work the API back from there.

**Workarounds you've tried**
What have you done in the meantime? How painful is the gap?
